description: Restaurant operations modernization project - Sysco, Toast, NetSuite integration
tagline: Automate meeting mining and decision capture for rollout governance
priority_status: Top Priority – first test environment for Chat Mining Agent

items: Deploy Chat Mining Agent for automatic meeting transcription
Capture decisions and action items from meetings
Generate structured summaries for rollout governance
Track meeting outcomes in persistent library
Document integration decisions (Sysco, Toast, NetSuite)
Track rollout milestones and blockers
Maintain decision history for stakeholder alignment
Automate governance reporting
Schedule regular sync meetings during rollout phases
Provide multiple time options for meetings to accommodate different schedules
Include all relevant stakeholders in communication threads
Check Toast coverage for store rollouts
Coordinate inter-restaurant training and exposure
Ensure MA stores are prepared for going live
Use feedback to guide decisions on coverage and training
Ensure inventory and labor accounts are set up correctly
Schedule inventories for new locations
Import employee data and vendor setup in advance
Verify location products before rollout to avoid missing data
Finalize liquor vendors before store openings
Test new pricing systems in lab before publishing to live stores
Implement price levels using spreadsheets for accuracy
Set up time-specific discounts (e.g., happy hour) with legal considerations
Ensure accurate pricing to avoid legal issues
Modernize restaurant operations through system integration
Connect Sysco (supply chain) + Toast (POS) + NetSuite (ERP)
Streamline operational workflows
Enable data-driven decision making

lexicon.focus: Meeting mining and decision capture for rollout governance

lexicon.purpose: Streamline restaurant supply ordering and inventory

lexicon.definition: The period during which a new system or process is implemented and monitored
A scheduled meeting for team members to align on progress, updates, and next steps
A professional responsible for guiding clients through the implementation of Point of Sale systems
Staffing and support available for the Toast system during store rollouts
A training model where staff from different restaurants are exposed to each other's operations to enhance skills and knowledge sharing
The process of officially launching a new store or system, making it operational for customers
A document outlining the necessary steps and requirements for launching a project or system
The designated teams or individuals responsible for overseeing specific aspects of the rollout
Point of Contact; the individual designated to communicate and coordinate on behalf of a group
A software platform used for inventory management and operational support in the restaurant industry (CrunchTime product)
A method of inventory management that focuses on addressing discrepancies or exceptions rather than tracking every item continuously
The process of monitoring and recording waste generated in the inventory to improve efficiency and reduce losses
Product data specific to each store location that must be configured before rollout
Different pricing tiers for items (e.g., regular, happy hour) managed through the POS system
Pricing adjustments that apply during specific time periods (e.g., happy hour pricing)

phase_1_actions.action: Create TGIF Chat Mining Agent schema and WCB

methods: Dropbox API (Python SDK or Zapier) for text extraction
Email parsing via Gmail API, Takeout, or Mailparser.io
Merge via jq CLI or JSON pipeline

agent_integration.chat_mining_agent: First test environment - Deploy for meeting transcription and decision capture
agent_integration.knowledge_retention_agent: Build persistent library of TGIF project knowledge

summary_log.topic: TGIF project initialization and Phase 1 plan
summary_log.notes: Extracted TGIF context from HCSS_RAL_TGIF mining report. Designated as TOP PRIORITY and first test environment for Chat Mining Agent. Focus: automate meeting mining and decision capture for Sysco/Toast/NetSuite rollout governance. Creating TGIF_ChatMining_Agent.wcb by 2025-11-04.

Extracted 3 forwarded emails from REF folder. (1) Toast rollout weekly sync scheduling with Tiana Awerbuch - established weekly meetings during rollout phase. (2) MA stores onsite support - need to check Toast coverage and coordinate inter-restaurant training with Barb. (3) Toast Go Live Checklist shared for IT tracking. Added patterns for onsite support and rollout governance. Expanded lexicon with rollout terminology.

summary_log.topic: Forwarded emails extraction - Training and meetings
summary_log.notes: Extracted 2 more forwarded emails. (1) Toast rollout discussion meeting with Trevor Samuelson - agenda focused on ownership groups, POCs, existing locations, and timeline. (2) CrunchTime onsite validation Day 1 training - Net-Chef dashboard, inventory setup, storage locations, by exception setup, waste tracking. Added lexicon for ownership groups, POC, Net-Chef, by exception setup, and waste tracking.

summary_log.topic: Otter transcripts - Oct 31 store rollout meetings
summary_log.notes: Extracted 2 Otter meeting transcripts from Oct 31. (1) Josh Matulsky and Tricia McHargue discussed setup for Stoughton and Methuen locations - addressed missing location products, inventory/labor account setup, scheduled inventories, employee data import, and vendor setup for Cisco Boston. Upcoming: 6 new stores Nov 11-12, finalize liquor vendors. (2) Mario Madaffari and Joe Kolafa discussed new price levels implementation - time-specific discounts for happy hour, testing in lab before publishing, legal considerations for accurate pricing. Added patterns for store setup and pricing management.
